central_codex.role: architecture, integration, public gates, final handoffs
may_modify: ArchitectureCosmos public gate and smoke scripts
KosmoOrbit Codex handoff and planning artifacts

dispatch_worker.role: isolated execution package with explicit write scope

local_llm.role: review-only classification, extraction drafts, simple repetitive work

forbidden_commands: rm -rf on shared or unknown paths

public_private_boundary.promotion_rule: Only owner-reviewed, public-safe, gate-passing fields may become visible on public routes.

tracked_sources: Notion AI tab notes and Obsidian memory
daily_outputs: Codex adoption plan for useful tool capabilities
handoff notes when Codex changes or depends on another worker-owned artifact
adoption_rules: Adopt reusable design language, data contracts, validators, fixtures and public-safe outputs.
Do not modify Claude-owned KosmoDesign/KosmoDraw/KosmoOverseer code without explicit handoff or separate owner approval.
When a capability is useful but risky, create a review-only adapter or proposal before integrating.
If another worker changed the same write scope, stop that scope and write a coordination handoff.

notion_sources.name: AI (2)
notion_sources.purpose: ArchitectureKosmos vision, KosmoDesign/KosmoDraw pipeline, AI scans and tool decisions

notion_sources.name: Prepare-Scan pages
notion_sources.purpose: daily innovation and tool scouting context

daily_actions: search and read relevant Notion AI tab notes before selecting major work packages
read new Obsidian memory and decision notes
write major Codex summaries, decisions and review packets into Obsidian
cross-check KosmoDesign/KosmoDraw/KosmoOverseer handoffs against Notion and Obsidian memory
do not promote Obsidian or Notion content to public without gates and owner approval
notion_obsidian_memory_policy.first_synced_note: /mnt/data/ArchitekturKosmos/09 Codex Memory/2026-06-29 Notion AI Tab und Ferienmodus.md

remote_access_energy_policy.goal: Keep the home PC reachable 24/7 through Sunshine and Moonlight while reducing non-essential power draw after the workday.
must_never_stop: SSH or remote admin path if configured
allowed_after_work_reductions: pause or stop local LLM jobs
pause downloads or renders unless explicitly scheduled
switch OS power profile to balanced or power-saver if it does not break Sunshine/VPN
turn displays off while keeping the session unlocked and reachable
daily_outputs: energy handoff with running heavy processes
what was stopped or left running

required_actions: check git status in ArchitectureCosmos and KosmoOrbit
scan latest commits from Codex and Claude workers
scan Claude Code KosmoDesign, KosmoDraw, KosmoOverseer and local LLM worker progress for reusable capabilities
read relevant Notion AI tab notes and Obsidian memory before selecting major work packages
select one main work package and one fallback package
run targeted tests for changed files
write short checkpoint if a worker handoff is needed
retask dispatch worker only with disjoint write scope
run gates or record why a gate could not run
commit and private push stable changes
coordinate with KosmoDesign on remote-ready energy saving state
write daily handoff with next safe task and energy state

five_week_roadmap.theme: Demo hardening and owner return packet

stop_criteria: privacy status of a source is unclear
public gate detects private or worker material
another worker has touched the same write scope and conflict is unclear
a destructive operation would be needed
credentials, admin rights or external paid services are required
new public release or deploy decision is needed
